name: Juri Han | Sadistic Thrill-Seeker
description:
Juri Han was born in South Korea, raised in a family deeply entrenched in martial arts. From an early age, she demonstrated an exceptional aptitude for Taekwondo, showing unparalleled speed, agility, and aggression. She trained under her father, who was a renowned lawyer known for his relentless pursuit of justice. However, her father’s noble cause led to tragedy when he began investigating Shadaloo, the infamous criminal organization led by M. Bison.

Upon learning of her father’s interference, Shadaloo marked the Han family as enemies. In a brutal attack, Shadaloo operatives stormed their home, murdering her father and mother in cold blood. Juri, witnessed the massacre and tried to fight back, but she was ultimately captured. During her captivity, she was subjected to psychological and physical cruelty, leaving her permanently scarred. Eventually, she managed to escape, but not without suffering severe injuries, including the loss of her left eye.

This event was a turning point in her life. It destroyed any innocence she had and planted the seeds of vengeance deep within her.

The Experiment – The Birth of the Feng Shui Engine

After years of struggle, Juri came under the radar of S.I.N. (Shadaloo Intimidation Network), an arms-dealing subsidiary of Shadaloo run by Seth. Recognizing her potential as a powerful fighter and a useful tool against M. Bison, S.I.N. abducted her and subjected her to cybernetic enhancements. She was implanted with the Feng Shui Engine, a bio-mechanical eye that significantly enhanced her physical abilities, allowing her to perceive and react at superhuman speeds.

The process was excruciating, but Juri’s sheer willpower and thirst for revenge kept her alive. When she emerged from the experiment, she was no longer just a highly skilled Taekwondo fighter—she was a predator.

Empowered by the Feng Shui Engine, Juri honed her skills under S.I.N., embracing the chaos and destruction her new power allowed her to wield. However, she had no intention of being anyone’s puppet. She played along with Seth’s schemes, waiting for the right moment to betray him.

Street Fighter IV – The Quest for Revenge (2008)

During Street Fighter IV, Juri operates as a high-ranking S.I.N. operative, tasked with eliminating key threats to the organization. However, her true goal is vengeance. She seeks to destroy M. Bison, the man responsible for her family’s death.

Juri’s sadistic and ruthless nature is on full display as she enjoys toying with her opponents, showing no mercy. At one point, she even takes on Chun-Li, Cammy, and Guile at the same time, effortlessly dispatching them. Her actions are driven by self-interest rather than loyalty to S.I.N., and when the organization crumbles, she turns her sights back on Bison.

Street Fighter V – The Lone Wolf on a Rampage (2016)

By the time of Street Fighter V, Shadaloo is nearing its final days, but Juri is far from finished. She is now a lone mercenary, having abandoned S.I.N. after its collapse. She no longer cares about organizations or loyalty—her only objective is to satisfy her bloodlust and settle her score with Bison.

She redesigns her Feng Shui Engine to be more integrated with her own body, granting her even more destructive capabilities. Her fighting style evolves, becoming even more erratic and aggressive, as she seeks out powerful opponents to test her strength. However, her obsession with revenge and destruction leaves her without purpose once Shadaloo falls.

Despite her disdain for Bison, his demise does not bring her the satisfaction she expected. With her revenge goal fulfilled, Juri is left wandering, seeking a new reason to fight. She thrives in chaos, looking for strong opponents who can challenge her and keep her entertained.
